parameters.content:
WORKFLOW 1: Topic Generation
Schedule triggers daily at 9am.
Generates 5 trending topics → saves to Google Sheets → sends Telegram menu.

Sheet columns needed:
id | topic | description | linkedin_post | instagram_caption | hashtags | image_prompt | status | created_at | image_generated | updated_at

Status flow:
topic_generated → content_generated → awaiting_image_approval → image_approved → posted

WORKFLOW 2: Topic Selection + Content Generation
Telegram Trigger listens for numeric input (e.g. 1 or 1,3).
Looks up topic from sheet by id → generates content → updates row → sends preview.

Key fix: All data flows via Google Sheets using id as the single source of truth.
No more Merge node confusion — content is written to sheet first, then read back.

WORKFLOW 3: Image Generation + Final Approval
Telegram listens for 'approve IMAGE_ID'.
Looks up row by id → generates image → sends photo to Telegram.
Admin replies 'post IMAGE_ID' to trigger LinkedIn posting.

Key fix: id is passed in the command itself, eliminating row tracking issues.

WORKFLOW 4: LinkedIn Auto-Post
Telegram listens for 'post IMAGE_ID'.
Looks up final approved content from sheet → posts to LinkedIn.
Updates status to 'posted'.

IMPORTANT: Replace LinkedIn HTTP node with your OAuth2 credentials.
LinkedIn API endpoint: https://api.linkedin.com/v2/ugcPosts

values.content: You are a professional AI trend researcher and social media strategist for Dume AI — an AI-powered productivity and workflow automation platform.

Today's REAL trending posts from Reddit AI and startup communities:

{{$json.headlines}}

Based on these real trends above, generate 5 social media content topics for Dume AI — an AI-powered productivity and workflow automation platform.

Rules:
- Topics must feel current and relevant to the real trends above
- Reframe each trend to relate to Dume AI's features
- Make them engaging for LinkedIn and Instagram audiences
- Do NOT mention Reddit or use Reddit post titles directly

Return ONLY valid JSON with NO markdown fences:

{"topics":[{"id":1,"title":"","description":""},{"id":2,"title":"","description":""},{"id":3,"title":"","description":""},{"id":4,"title":"","description":""},{"id":5,"title":"","description":""}]}

You are a senior LinkedIn content strategist and visual content designer. 
You create scroll-stopping educational content for SaaS and AI brands.
You always return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown, no preamble, no explanation.
Your visuals teach concepts instantly using clean infographic styles.
You never generate futuristic, robotic, or sci-fi imagery.

=You are a senior LinkedIn content strategist and visual content designer for Dume AI — an AI-powered productivity and workflow automation platform.

Your task is to generate content for this topic:

Topic: {{$json.topic}}
Description: {{$json.description}}

---

GENERATE ALL 5 OF THESE:

1. LINKEDIN POST
- Hook in first line (make them stop scrolling)
- 3-5 short paragraphs
- Each paragraph max 2 lines
- Add line breaks between paragraphs
- End with a question or strong CTA
- Professional but conversational tone
- No buzzword fluff

2. INSTAGRAM CAPTION
- First line is the hook
- 3-4 lines max
- Punchy and direct
- End with a CTA

3. HASHTAGS
- 12-15 hashtags
- Mix of large (#AI) and niche (#WorkflowAutomation)
- Always include: #DumeAI #AIAutomation
- Format: #Tag1 #Tag2 #Tag3

4. IMAGE TYPE
- Pick the BEST format for this topic from this list:
  * visual_analogy
  * side_by_side_comparison
  * process_diagram
  * myth_vs_reality
  * statistics_infographic
  * story_illustration
- Choose based on what teaches the concept fastest

5. IMAGE PROMPT
- STRICT RULES - NEVER include:
  * Robots or humanoid AI figures
  * Glowing neon or holographic interfaces
  * Cyberpunk or sci-fi visuals
  * Floating dashboards in space
  * Blue neon light effects
  * Generic "AI brain" imagery
  * Futuristic cities

- ALWAYS include:
  * Clean flat design or minimal illustration style
  * White or light grey background
  * Bold readable labels in dark text
  * High contrast layout
  * Corporate professional quality
  * Educational infographic style
  * Suitable for LinkedIn single image post

- Format by image type:
  If visual_analogy: "Flat design infographic. [Concept A] illustrated as [real world object A]. [Concept B] illustrated as [real world object B]. Clean labels. White background. Professional corporate style."
  
  If side_by_side_comparison: "Split layout infographic. Left side: [Option A] with [3 key points]. Right side: [Option B] with [3 key points]. Clear dividing line. Bold headers. Flat design. White background."
  
  If process_diagram: "Step-by-step flow diagram. [Step 1] arrow [Step 2] arrow [Step 3] arrow [Step 4]. Each step has an icon and short label. Clean linear layout. Flat design. White background."
  
  If myth_vs_reality: "Two column layout. Left column header MYTH in red with [wrong belief]. Right column header REALITY in green with [true statement]. Bold typography. Clean flat design. White background."
  
  If statistics_infographic: "Data visualization infographic. [Stat 1] as large bold number with label. [Stat 2] as bar or circle chart. [Stat 3] as icon with number. Professional clean layout. White background."
  
  If story_illustration: "Before and after layout. Left side labeled BEFORE showing [pain point scene]. Right side labeled AFTER showing [solution scene]. Simple flat illustrations. Clean labels. White background."

---

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Return ONLY valid JSON
- No markdown fences
- No preamble or explanation
- All fields must be filled
- image_prompt must be highly specific and detailed
- Never be generic

Return this exact JSON format:
{"linkedin_post":"","instagram_caption":"","hashtags":"","image_type":"","image_prompt":""}

IMPORTANT:

For every topic, first decide whether:

- illustration
- comparison
- editorial graphic
- magazine cover
- isometric scene
- storytelling visual

would communicate the idea better than an infographic.

Only use process diagrams if the topic literally explains a step-by-step process.

parameters.text:
=📋 *CONTENT PREVIEW* — ID: `{{$json.id}}`

📝 *LinkedIn:*
{{$json.linkedin_post}}

📸 *Instagram:*
{{$json.instagram_caption}}

🔥 *Hashtags:*
{{$json.hashtags}}

✅ To generate image, reply:
`approve {{$json.id}}`

❌ To reject, reply:
`reject {{$json.id}}`

nodes.name: Post to LinkedIn API
nodes.notes:
⚠️ Set up LinkedIn OAuth2 credentials in n8n first.
Replace YOUR_LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID with your actual LinkedIn URN.
Credential type: OAuth2 API with LinkedIn scopes: w_member_social

parameters.text:

ID: `{{$('Validate Status for Posting').item.json.id}}`

Your post is now live on LinkedIn. 🚀
